snippet.title: POLKAHOLIKI - BELA ROЕҪA (Official Video)
snippet.description:
POLKAHOLIKI poДҚinju 2021. godinu sa svojim prvim valcerom! Ma da je veДҮ u imenu Polkaholiki jasno da im je polka najdraЕҫa, takoД‘er oboЕҫavaju i valcere. BIJELA RUЕҪA je pjesma o ljubavi, ДҚekanju, nadi... Pravi romantiДҚni glazbeni film sa dvoje zaljubljenih!

SI: POLKAHOLIKI zaДҚenjajo leto s prvim VALДҢKOM! ДҢeprav so POLKAholiki, oboЕҫujejo vso narodnozabavno glasbo! BELA ROЕҪA, pesem o ljubezni, ДҚakanju in upanju, romantiДҚna zgodba o dveh zaljubljencih, je tu!  

LYRICS рҹҮёрҹҮ®

Gledam za tabo, ЕЎtejem korake,
zdaj si le pika daleДҚ stran.
Solze velike, nikdar enake,
a mi bo pesem krajЕЎala dan.

Vse sva imela, veДҚ si hotela,
sreДҚo iskala boЕЎ drugje,
jaz pa ЕЎe upam, nate ЕЎe ДҚakam,
ЕЎe verjamem v ДҚudeЕҫe.

BELA ROЕҪA BO CVETELA
VSE DOKLER NE BOЕ  NAZAJ,
BELA ROЕҪA, DA ME SPOMNI
NA NAJLEPЕ I NAJIN MAJ.

Е E CVETI IN NE OVENE,
LE ODPADE KAKЕ EN CVET,
BELA ROЕҪA ZA SPOMINE,
DA ME VRNE K TEBI SPET.

ЕҪalost je laЕҫja, vДҚasih izgine,
kadar si laЕҫem, da mi gre.
A tvoja koЕҫa, mehka kot svila,
je predaleДҚ, daleДҚ je.

Hodim po poti, kot da si z mano,
upanje pa ЕЎe tiho tli.
Ko enkrat ljubiЕЎ, paДҚ ne pozabiЕЎ,
to ostane, ne zbledi.

LYRICS рҹҮӯрҹҮ·

Gledam za tobom, brojim korake,
sada si samo toДҚka daleko od mene. 
Suze velike, nikad iste,
a pjesma mi je skratila dan.

Sve smo imali, htjela si viЕЎe,
sreДҮu ДҮeЕЎ traЕҫiti drugdje,
a ja se joЕЎ nadam, tebe joЕЎ ДҚekam,
joЕЎ vjerujem u ДҚuda.

BIJELA RUЕҪA ДҶE PROCVIJETATI
SVE DOK SE NE VRATIЕ  NAZAD
BIJELA RUЕҪA, DA ME PODSJETI
NA NAJLJEPЕ I NAЕ  SVIBANJ.

JOЕ  CVIJETA I NE VENE,
OTPADA SAMO PO KOJI CVIJET.
BIJELA RUЕҪA ZA USPOMENE,
DA ME VRATI TEBI OPET.

Tuga je lakЕЎa, ponekad nestane
kad si laЕҫem, da mi ide.
Ali tvoja koЕҫa, mekana kao  svila,
predaleko je, daleko je.

Hodam po putu, kao da si sa mnom, 
nada joЕЎ tiho tinja (nada i dalje tiho tinja - tinja kao vatra koja tinja je kod nas) 
Kad jednom voliЕЎ, ne zaboraviЕЎ,
to ostaje, ne blijedi.


Music: Raay // Lyrics: Rok LunaДҚek & Maja Kvertkov // music production: M-MEDIA, SodraЕҫica 2021 // glazbena producenta: Tadej MiheliДҚ & Raay // video by: NEO VISUALS, 2021 // Executive producer: Raay

- Teo Butolen / hvala za super jeklenega konjiДҚka in nostalgijo z Yugom
- Mesarija FinguЕЎt

MARKO Е KUGOR - KAP VODE

Glazba: Marko TomasoviДҮ
Tekst: Josip RalaЕЎiДҮ
AranЕҫman: Leo Е karo
IzdavaДҚ: Zvuci Mediterana

VIDEO PRODUKCIJA: ZupanДҚiДҚ DESIGN Video

"KAP VODE"

NoДҮas duЕЎu pred svima otvaram,
i cijelog sebe zauvijek tebi poklanjam.
Ovaj ples neka traje zauvijek,
tvoja je ljubav nemiru mom lijek.

Ref.
Moja si mirna luka na ovom moru nemira,   
A tvoja njeЕҫna ruka mom je srcu postelja.   
I na kraj svijeta, ako treba, ja sam spreman za tebe,
tvoja ljubav kap je vode usred pustinje.

NoДҮas si lijepa, najljepЕЎa od svih,
i sve rijeДҚi svijeta sad stanu mi u stih.
Al dovoljan je samo jedan pogled tih,
naЕЎa ljubav nije od obiДҚnih.

Zagrli me ДҚvrsto, nikad ne puЕЎtaj,
sve dok diЕЎem, dok mi sviДҮe,
ova ljubav nema kraj. 

Kopiranje je zabranjeno, svaku neovlaЕЎtenu kopiju bit ДҮemo primorani ukloniti!

В© Zvuci Mediterana, 2021.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know.

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

localized.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isnвҖҷt an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyoneвҖҷs favorite activity, but it can be very messy вҖ” and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little oneвҖҷs outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day wonвҖҷt take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 вҖ” The pacifier hack 

2:42 вҖ” A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 вҖ” The getting along/best friendsвҖҷ shirt 

7:20 вҖ” Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 вҖ” Tasty gummy bear lollies

snippet.title: Starship SN9 Flight Test
snippet.description:
SpaceX is set to launch the Starship SN9 prototype to an altitude of approximately 10 kilometers. A launch attempt is possible between 9 am and 6 pm Central time on Tuesday. However, as with testing, there is always a chance that teams could decide to stand down and try again on a different day.

snippet.title: Starship | SN9 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
On Tuesday, February 2, Starship serial number 9 (SN9) completed SpaceXвҖҷs second high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from our site in Cameron County, Texas.

Similar to the high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 8 (SN8), SN9 was powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee вҖ“ approximately 10 kilometers in altitude. SN9 successfully performed a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.

The Starship prototype descended under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control StarshipвҖҷs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. During the landing flip maneuver, one of the Raptor engines did not relight and caused SN9 to land at high speed and experience a RUD.

These test flights are all about improving our understanding and development of a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.

snippet.title: I am so confused.
snippet.description:
Schlatt wonders why his last video got 80,000 comments.

Follow me on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/jschlatt

Follow me on Instagram:
https://instagram.com/jschlatt

Truly disgusting, that some people would do this horrible thing. Why? Why did you comment this? Are you part of the problem? No, I'll tell you what the problem is. The problem is that TommyInnit and the Dream SMP are getting more viewers than me even though I'm so much cooler than everyone else on it (like Ranboo, Awesamdude, Karl Jacobs, and others whose names I forgot). Tubbo is pretty cool I guess though. Schlatt talks about why his latest video got 80,000 comments, which is insane and almost seems like algorithm manipulation (CC: Spiffing Brit). Almost as bad as the algorithm manipulation that writing these meaningless paragraphs contributes to. But hey I'm in it for the money. ToaLegend makes an appearance as well, with his hit classic "Nibble" which will now get millions of comments I bet. Please be nice.

snippet.title: Sanela kupila ovce, kombi, napravila ЕЎtalu
snippet.description:
Prije gotovo mjesec dana objavili smo priДҚu o samohranoj majci koja motornom pilom ruЕЎi ЕЎumu i zaraД‘uje novac za svoju djecu. Nije imala nikakvih redovnih primanja za Еҫivot a troje djece ЕЎalje u ЕЎkolu. NaЕЎa priДҚa dirnula je u srce mnoge ljude diljem svijeta pa su Saneli slali pomoДҮ koju je ona koristila za kupovinu ovaca, kombija pravljenje ЕЎtale. Njezin Еҫivot promijenjen je u potpunosti ali na bolje. Pogledajte priДҚu.
PridruЕҫite se tom kanalu da biste dobili pristup pogodnostima:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCIu6gtFVDK1u93irvvVrD2A/join

snippet.title: Р”РІРҫСҖРөСҶ РҙР»СҸ РҹСғСӮРёРҪР°. РҳСҒСӮРҫСҖРёСҸ СҒР°РјРҫР№ РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫР№ РІР·СҸСӮРәРё
snippet.description:
РўРөРәСҒСӮ СҖР°СҒСҒР»РөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ СҒРҫ РІСҒРөРјРё РҙРҫРәСғРјРөРҪСӮР°РјРё Р·РҙРөСҒСҢ https://palace.navalny.com/

РӯСӮРҫ РІРёРҙРөРҫ РқР°РІР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ Р·Р°РҝРёСҒР°Р» РҙРҫ СҒРІРҫРөРіРҫ РІРҫР·РІСҖР°СүРөРҪРёСҸ РІ Р РҫСҒСҒРёСҺ, РҪРҫ РјСӢ СҒСҖР°Р·Сғ РҙРҫРіРҫРІРҫСҖРёР»РёСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ РІСӢРҝСғСҒСӮРёРј РөРіРҫ РҝРҫСҒР»Рө: РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РҪРө С…РҫСӮРөР», СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РіР»Р°РІРҪСӢР№ РіРөСҖРҫР№ СҚСӮРҫРіРҫ СҖР°СҒСҒР»РөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ вҖ“ Р’Р»Р°РҙРёРјРёСҖ РҹСғСӮРёРҪ вҖ“ РҙСғРјР°Р», СҮСӮРҫ РјСӢ РөРіРҫ РұРҫРёРјСҒСҸ Рё Рҫ РөРіРҫ СҒР°РјРҫРј РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫРј СҒРөРәСҖРөСӮРө СҖР°СҒСҒРәР°Р·СӢРІР°РөРј РёР·-Р·Р° РіСҖР°РҪРёСҶСӢ.

РЎРөРіРҫРҙРҪСҸ РІСӢ СғРІРёРҙРёСӮРө СӮРҫ, СҮСӮРҫ СҒСҮРёСӮР°РөСӮСҒСҸ РҪРөРІРҫР·РјРҫР¶РҪСӢРј СғРІРёРҙРөСӮСҢ РІРұР»РёР·Рё. Р’РјРөСҒСӮРө СҒ РҪР°РјРё Р·Р°Р№РҙРөСӮРө СӮСғРҙР°, РәСғРҙР° РҪРёРәРҫРіРҫ РҪРө РҝСғСҒРәР°СҺСӮ. РңСӢ РҝРҫРҝР°РҙРөРј РІ РіРҫСҒСӮРё Рә РҹСғСӮРёРҪСғ. РЎРІРҫРёРјРё РіР»Р°Р·Р°РјРё СғРұРөРҙРёРјСҒСҸ РІ СӮРҫРј, СҮСӮРҫ СҚСӮРҫСӮ СҮРөР»РҫРІРөРә РІ СҒРІРҫРөР№ СӮСҸРіРө Рә СҖРҫСҒРәРҫСҲРё, Рә РұРҫРіР°СӮСҒСӮРІСғ СҒРҝСҸСӮРёР» СҒРҫРІРөСҖСҲРөРҪРҪРҫ. РЈР·РҪР°РөРј, СҮСҢРёРјРё РҙРөРҪСҢРіР°РјРё Рё РәР°Рә С„РёРҪР°РҪСҒРёСҖСғРөСӮСҒСҸ СҚСӮР° СҖРҫСҒРәРҫСҲСҢ. Рҳ РәР°Рә РІ СӮРөСҮРөРҪРёРө РҝРҫСҒР»РөРҙРҪРёС… 15 Р»РөСӮ РҙР°РөСӮСҒСҸ СҒР°РјР°СҸ РұРҫР»СҢСҲР°СҸ РІР·СҸСӮРәР° РІ РёСҒСӮРҫСҖРёРё Рё СҒСӮСҖРҫРёСӮСҒСҸ СҒР°РјСӢР№ РҙРҫСҖРҫРіРҫР№ РІ РјРёСҖРө РҙРІРҫСҖРөСҶ. 

РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РұСӢР» Р·Р°РҙРөСҖР¶Р°РҪ РІ Р°СҚСҖРҫРҝРҫСҖСӮСғ, РәСғРҙР° РҝСҖРёР»РөСӮРөР» РҝРҫСҒР»Рө 5-РјРөСҒСҸСҮРҪРҫРіРҫ Р»РөСҮРөРҪРёСҸ РІ Р“РөСҖРјР°РҪРёРё. РўР°Рј РҫРҪ РҫРәР°Р·Р°Р»СҒСҸ РҝРҫСҒР»Рө СӮРҫРіРҫ, РәР°Рә РҹСғСӮРёРҪ РҝРҫРҝСӢСӮР°Р»СҒСҸ РөРіРҫ СғРұРёСӮСҢ. 18 СҸРҪРІР°СҖСҸ РқР°РІР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ РұСӢР» РҪРөР·Р°РәРҫРҪРҪРҫ Р°СҖРөСҒСӮРҫРІР°РҪ Рё РҝРҫРјРөСүРөРҪ РІ РЎРҳР—Рһ.

РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РІСҒРөРіРҙР° РұРҫСҖРөСӮСҒСҸ Р·Р° РҪР°СҲРё РҝСҖР°РІР°, Р° СӮРөРҝРөСҖСҢ РјСӢ РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪСӢ РҝРҫРұРҫСҖРҫСӮСҢСҒСҸ Р·Р° РөРіРҫ. Р’Р»Р°РҙРёРјРёСҖ РҹСғСӮРёРҪ РҫРұСҸР·Р°РҪ РҫСӮРІРөСӮРёСӮСҢ Р·Р° РІСҒРө СҒРІРҫРё РҝСҖРөСҒСӮСғРҝР»РөРҪРёСҸ.

localized.title: Р”РІРҫСҖРөСҶ РҙР»СҸ РҹСғСӮРёРҪР°. РҳСҒСӮРҫСҖРёСҸ СҒР°РјРҫР№ РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫР№ РІР·СҸСӮРәРё
localized.description:
РўРөРәСҒСӮ СҖР°СҒСҒР»РөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ СҒРҫ РІСҒРөРјРё РҙРҫРәСғРјРөРҪСӮР°РјРё Р·РҙРөСҒСҢ https://palace.navalny.com/

РӯСӮРҫ РІРёРҙРөРҫ РқР°РІР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ Р·Р°РҝРёСҒР°Р» РҙРҫ СҒРІРҫРөРіРҫ РІРҫР·РІСҖР°СүРөРҪРёСҸ РІ Р РҫСҒСҒРёСҺ, РҪРҫ РјСӢ СҒСҖР°Р·Сғ РҙРҫРіРҫРІРҫСҖРёР»РёСҒСҢ, СҮСӮРҫ РІСӢРҝСғСҒСӮРёРј РөРіРҫ РҝРҫСҒР»Рө: РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РҪРө С…РҫСӮРөР», СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РіР»Р°РІРҪСӢР№ РіРөСҖРҫР№ СҚСӮРҫРіРҫ СҖР°СҒСҒР»РөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёСҸ вҖ“ Р’Р»Р°РҙРёРјРёСҖ РҹСғСӮРёРҪ вҖ“ РҙСғРјР°Р», СҮСӮРҫ РјСӢ РөРіРҫ РұРҫРёРјСҒСҸ Рё Рҫ РөРіРҫ СҒР°РјРҫРј РұРҫР»СҢСҲРҫРј СҒРөРәСҖРөСӮРө СҖР°СҒСҒРәР°Р·СӢРІР°РөРј РёР·-Р·Р° РіСҖР°РҪРёСҶСӢ.

РЎРөРіРҫРҙРҪСҸ РІСӢ СғРІРёРҙРёСӮРө СӮРҫ, СҮСӮРҫ СҒСҮРёСӮР°РөСӮСҒСҸ РҪРөРІРҫР·РјРҫР¶РҪСӢРј СғРІРёРҙРөСӮСҢ РІРұР»РёР·Рё. Р’РјРөСҒСӮРө СҒ РҪР°РјРё Р·Р°Р№РҙРөСӮРө СӮСғРҙР°, РәСғРҙР° РҪРёРәРҫРіРҫ РҪРө РҝСғСҒРәР°СҺСӮ. РңСӢ РҝРҫРҝР°РҙРөРј РІ РіРҫСҒСӮРё Рә РҹСғСӮРёРҪСғ. РЎРІРҫРёРјРё РіР»Р°Р·Р°РјРё СғРұРөРҙРёРјСҒСҸ РІ СӮРҫРј, СҮСӮРҫ СҚСӮРҫСӮ СҮРөР»РҫРІРөРә РІ СҒРІРҫРөР№ СӮСҸРіРө Рә СҖРҫСҒРәРҫСҲРё, Рә РұРҫРіР°СӮСҒСӮРІСғ СҒРҝСҸСӮРёР» СҒРҫРІРөСҖСҲРөРҪРҪРҫ. РЈР·РҪР°РөРј, СҮСҢРёРјРё РҙРөРҪСҢРіР°РјРё Рё РәР°Рә С„РёРҪР°РҪСҒРёСҖСғРөСӮСҒСҸ СҚСӮР° СҖРҫСҒРәРҫСҲСҢ. Рҳ РәР°Рә РІ СӮРөСҮРөРҪРёРө РҝРҫСҒР»РөРҙРҪРёС… 15 Р»РөСӮ РҙР°РөСӮСҒСҸ СҒР°РјР°СҸ РұРҫР»СҢСҲР°СҸ РІР·СҸСӮРәР° РІ РёСҒСӮРҫСҖРёРё Рё СҒСӮСҖРҫРёСӮСҒСҸ СҒР°РјСӢР№ РҙРҫСҖРҫРіРҫР№ РІ РјРёСҖРө РҙРІРҫСҖРөСҶ. 

РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РұСӢР» Р·Р°РҙРөСҖР¶Р°РҪ РІ Р°СҚСҖРҫРҝРҫСҖСӮСғ, РәСғРҙР° РҝСҖРёР»РөСӮРөР» РҝРҫСҒР»Рө 5-РјРөСҒСҸСҮРҪРҫРіРҫ Р»РөСҮРөРҪРёСҸ РІ Р“РөСҖРјР°РҪРёРё. РўР°Рј РҫРҪ РҫРәР°Р·Р°Р»СҒСҸ РҝРҫСҒР»Рө СӮРҫРіРҫ, РәР°Рә РҹСғСӮРёРҪ РҝРҫРҝСӢСӮР°Р»СҒСҸ РөРіРҫ СғРұРёСӮСҢ. 18 СҸРҪРІР°СҖСҸ РқР°РІР°Р»СҢРҪСӢР№ РұСӢР» РҪРөР·Р°РәРҫРҪРҪРҫ Р°СҖРөСҒСӮРҫРІР°РҪ Рё РҝРҫРјРөСүРөРҪ РІ РЎРҳР—Рһ.

РҗР»РөРәСҒРөР№ РІСҒРөРіРҙР° РұРҫСҖРөСӮСҒСҸ Р·Р° РҪР°СҲРё РҝСҖР°РІР°, Р° СӮРөРҝРөСҖСҢ РјСӢ РҙРҫР»Р¶РҪСӢ РҝРҫРұРҫСҖРҫСӮСҢСҒСҸ Р·Р° РөРіРҫ. Р’Р»Р°РҙРёРјРёСҖ РҹСғСӮРёРҪ РҫРұСҸР·Р°РҪ РҫСӮРІРөСӮРёСӮСҢ Р·Р° РІСҒРө СҒРІРҫРё РҝСҖРөСҒСӮСғРҝР»РөРҪРёСҸ.

Ooh
Na na, yeah
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I'm not with you
But then you saw me, caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eye
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could've asked me why I broke your heart
You could've told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn't there
And just pretended like you didn't care
I don't know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
So
I made you think that I would always stay
I said some things that I should never say
Yeah, I broke your heart like someone did to mine
And now you won't love me for a second time
I don't know why I run away, oh, girl
Said I make you cry when I run away
Girl, take me back 'cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that I'm much too late
And you deserve someone better

snippet.title: DUBOKU DRЕҪAVU ДҢEKA KRAH: PoДҚinju hapЕЎenja krupnih zverki i to moЕҫe da izazove velike posledice!
snippet.description:
Gost na YouTube kanalu "Nauka i Misterije Balkan" bila je prof. dr Nada KostiДҮ, profesor na Medicinskom fakultetu i bivЕЎa ministarka zdravlja u Vladi Republike Srbije. PreporuДҚujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viЕЎe o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Emisiju je vodio novinar TeЕЎa TeЕЎanoviДҮ.

*************************************************************

Zabranjeno je svako preuzimanje snimaka i objavljivanje na drugim YouTube kanalima. Svi duplikati ДҮe biti uklanjani u skladu sa YouTube pravilima. Iz ovoga ДҮe biti izuzeti samo oni koji dobiju specijalnu dozvolu od vlasnika autorskih prava.

Autorska prava: "BALKAN INFO - ZvaniДҚni kanal"
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCLG5Qu54Q7gywaCeDs5etuQ

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Еҫele da pomognu rad naЕЎe produkcije to mogu uДҚiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. TrudiДҮemo se da ostanemo dosledni naЕЎoj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i ЕЎirenju istine bez cenzure.

PAYPAL - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.paypal.me/tvbalkaninfo/

PATREON - Donacije za naЕЎu produkciju
https://www.patreon.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Druge moguДҮnosti za donacije
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/donacije/

*************************************************************

Rad naЕЎe produkcije moЕҫete podrЕҫati kupovinom majica, dukserica, ЕЎolja i drugih proizvoda koji uz moderan i elegantan dizajn promoviЕЎu vrednosti za koje se svi zajedno borimo.

BALKAN INFO - ZvaniДҚna online prodavnica
https://www.balkaninfo.rs/prodavnica/

TEESPRING - Online prodavnica (samo za inostranstvo)
https://teespring.com/stores/tvbalkaninfo/

*************************************************************

BALKAN INFO je nezavisna medijska produkcija osnovana u junu 2015. godine u Beogradu. Prepoznati smo kao glas svih koji ne Еҫele da budu deo kratkotrajnih projekata i saveza, svih onih koji poЕЎtuju srpske tradicionalne vrednosti i koji ДҚuvaju seДҮanje na naЕЎe slavne pretke.

BALKAN INFO - Nezavisna medijska produkcija
https://www.youtube.com/tvbalkaninfo/

DOKUMENTARNE EMISIJE BALKAN - Kratki snimci
https://www.youtube.com/dokumentarcibalkan/

NAUKA I MISTERIJE BALKAN - NaЕЎ drugi kanal
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCcn8Zys1jwO41ZRvftuYqIg

*************************************************************

NaЕЎ rad moЕҫete pratiti i na drugim druЕЎtvenim mreЕҫama:

BALKAN INFO - Facebook
https://www.facebook.com/tvbalkaninfo

BALKAN INFO - Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/tvbalkaninfo/

BALKAN INFO - Twitter
https://twitter.com/tvbalkaninfo

*************************************************************

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong вҖ“ Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
В 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong,вҖқ the next epic adventure in LegendaryвҖҷs cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in вҖңGodzilla vs. KongвҖқ as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titansвҖ”instigated by unseen forcesвҖ”is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander SkarsgГҘrd (вҖңBig Little Lies,вҖқ вҖңThe Little Drummer GirlвҖқ), Millie Bobby Brown (вҖңStranger ThingsвҖқ), Rebecca Hall (вҖңChristine,вҖқ вҖңProfessor Marston and the Wonder WomenвҖқ), Brian Tyree Henry (вҖңJoker,вҖқ вҖңSpider-Man: Into the Spider-VerseвҖқ), Shun Oguri (вҖңWeathering with YouвҖқ), Eiza GonzГЎlez (вҖңFast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & ShawвҖқ), Julian Dennison (вҖңDeadpool 2вҖқ), with Kyle Chandler (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ) and DemiГЎn Bichir (вҖңThe Nun,вҖқ вҖңThe Hateful EightвҖқ).
Wingard (вҖңThe Guest,вҖқ вҖңYouвҖҷre NextвҖқ) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (вҖңThor: RagnarokвҖқ) and Max Borenstein (вҖңGodzilla: King of the Monsters,вҖқ вҖңKong: Skull IslandвҖқ), story by Terry Rossio (вҖңPirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No TalesвҖқ) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), based on the character вҖңGodzillaвҖқ owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The directorвҖҷs behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (вҖңThe Mummy,вҖқ вҖңWorld War ZвҖқ), production designers Owen Paterson (вҖңJumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,вҖқ вҖңGodzillaвҖқ) and Thomas S. Hammock (вҖңBlair WitchвҖқ), editor Josh Schaeffer (вҖңGodzilla: King of the MonstersвҖқ), costume designer Ann Foley (вҖңSkyscraperвҖқ) and visual effects supervisor John вҖңDJвҖқ DesJardin (upcoming вҖңZack SnyderвҖҷs Justice LeagueвҖқ).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, вҖңGodzilla vs. Kong.вҖқ  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little Blurry вҖ” Official Trailer #2 | Apple TV+
snippet.description:
Witness the incredible rise of Billie Eilish in "Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ as she tours and records the album that changes her life. Watch on Apple TV+ February 26: https://apple.co/_BillieEilishDoc 

"Billie Eilish: The WorldвҖҷs A Little BlurryвҖқ tells the true coming-of-age story of the singer-songwriter and her rise to global superstardom. From award-winning filmmaker R.J. Cutler, the documentary offers a deeply intimate look at this extraordinary teenagerвҖҷs journey, at just seventeen years old, navigating life on the road, on stage, and at home with her family, while writing, recording and releasing her debut album вҖңWHEN WE ALL FALL ASLEEP, WHERE DO WE GO?вҖқ 

The documentary is from Apple Original Films, in association with Interscope Films, Darkroom, This Machine and Lighthouse Management & Media. Directed by R.J. Cutler and starring Billie Eilish, Finneas OвҖҷConnell, Maggie Baird, and Patrick OвҖҷConnell as themselves.

snippet.title: "KUWTK" Final Season Begins This March on E! | E!
snippet.description:
After 14 years, Kim, Khloe, Kourtney, Kendall, Kylie, Rob, Scott & Kris are saying goodbye to "Keeping Up With the Kardashians." The final season premieres Thursday, March 18, only on E!

#KUWTK #KeepingUpWithTheKardashians #EEntertainment #KimKardashian #KhloГ©Kardashian #KourtneyKardashian #KylieJenner #KendallJenner #KrisJenner #RobKardashian #ScottDisick

SUBSCRIBE: http://www.youtube.com/kuwtk

About Keeping Up With the Kardashians:
"Keeping Up with the KardashiansвҖқ takes viewers beyond the headlines and into the stories that dominate the news cycle and E! is the only destination to get the real story. Keep Up with the Kardashian-Jenner fam as they build business empires, face personal challenges, and share ups and downs together. Through all the epic moments, one thing remains the sameвҖҰ family always comes first. The Kardashian-Jenner clan continue to overcome it all through their unwavering love and commitment to each other.

Watch Keeping Up With the Kardashians March 18th at 8/7c

E! is on the Pulse of Pop Culture, bringing fans the very best original content including reality series, topical programming, exclusive specials, breaking entertainment news, and more. Passionate viewers canвҖҷt get enough of our Pop Culture hits including "Keeping Up with the Kardashians," "Total Divas,вҖқ and вҖңVery Cavallari.вҖқ And with new original programming on the way, fans have even more to love.

snippet.title: How I lost 32 pounds of FAT and 10 inches off my waist | Glow up Diaries Season 2, Episode 2
snippet.description:
My emotional weight loss transformation story and a FULL 20 minute in depth guide at the end of this video. I wanted to share my full story before taking you on my glow up journey. Episode 3 will be showing you how I begin to transform. 

вҖў Workout program: https://www.atumobile.com/
Please email info@atumobile.com if youвҖҷre having trouble singing up
вҖў Nutrition: https://amzn.to/3qR031V
вҖў Muscle protection !! - https://amzn.to/2Yg4cQI
вҖў Melatonin for my troubled sleepers - https://amzn.to/3qLrdaq

вқ’ TIMELINE OF THE VIDEO (if youвҖҷre confused) вҖ”
вҖў September 2019: I moved back to LA and continued to struggle with my fitness journey.
вҖў Nov 20, 2019 - Feb. 2020: I did in person training sessions with Steve and failed because I couldnвҖҷt get my act together. My extreme sugar addiction: January 2020 - April 2020. Lesson learned: Yes working with a trainer is extremely motivational but if you donвҖҷt want it for yourself, you will never get it. Nobody is going to come and save you. You need to save yourself. And I NEVER GAVE UP!! 
вҖў End of April 2020: I began SteveвҖҷs online workout program and succeeded. 
90% of the time I did the program in my garage at my parents house or my apartment. 10% of the time I had access to a gym and would do it there. 

Follow Steve for support on your journey!! вҷЎ
Instagram: @aTighterU
Facebook: @Steve Zim and @A Tighter U
Twitter: @ZimFit

вҷЎ MY FIRST EVER MERCH LINE: https://Fanjoy.co/Alivia

Subscribe to follow the rest of my glow up journey! Catch episode 3 which is all about how to transform your MINDSET!

вҳ… EPISODE 2 RESOURCES: 
GLOW UP DISCORD: https://discord.gg/3dWWuBgtG8
BOOK: https://amzn.to/3a5sEtK
WORKSHEET: check back here Jan. 7 *SORRY FOR THE DELAY. IвҖҷm soo busy with editing I havenвҖҷt had time to focus on these. These worksheets are really well thought out and I just have to take a full 13 hours to create it LOL. 
CHALLENGE: How did you do with the glow up challenge? Tell me your stories in the comments below! 

вң° Glow Up Diaries Season 2 Episodes: https://bit.ly/3qREVbP
вһ© Previous Episode: https://bit.ly/36crLy6

вҷЎ FOLLOW ME вҷЎ
вң— Instagram: @aliviadandrea
вң— Glow up Diary Instagram: @a.glow.up.diary
вң— Twitter: @aliviadandrea
вң— TIKTOK: @aliviadandrea
вң— Facebook: @aliviadandreaofficial
вң— Pinterest: Alivia DвҖҷAndrea
вң— Shop my Amazon page: https://amzn.to/2RDt2qO

вҷЎ Chinese Social media platforms вҷЎ
вң— Weibo: https://weibo.com/u/7293344428
вң— Bilibili: https://bit.ly/3cx18Fd

ABOUT THE GLOW UP DIARIES: At rock bottom I picked up a camera and began documenting my physical and mental pain that seemingly existed without meaning. For the next two years I recorded the вҖңGlow Up DiariesвҖқ which is a raw docu-series of my deepest, most painful moments in an effort to find a newer, brighter existence. I openly share my difficulties despite the insistence of the media that such вҖңshamefulвҖқ feelings be kept in a closet. 

вң° BUSINESS INQUIRIES: alivia@select.co

вң° MUSIC 
MY SPOTIFY: FIERCELIVY
Someday - Ben Camden: https://thmatc.co/?l=920EED63
Chasing Fire - Lauv: https://thmatc.co/?l=63F8D20D


вҡ‘ FTC This video is not sponsored.

snippet.title: Emanet 105. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 105
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

snippet.title: Galaxy S21 Ultra Durability Test - What About the Camera?!
snippet.description:
Its time to Durability test the Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G. Grab your teardown skin here: https://dbrand.com/teardown Samsung has once again released a top of the line Android smartphone that costs $1200 dollars. Is it durable? Can the Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra survive a JerryRigEverything Durability Test? One thing Samsung is good at, is being consistent. So the odds are in their favor. We'll start by scratching the S21 Ultra, seeing what its made of, and finishing off with a bend test. 

Watch the 6 year old New York Note 4 video HERE: https://youtu.be/0a92lrIMx4o

Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/ 

*Follow me for updates!*
Instagram: http://instagram.com/zacksjerryrig
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1U4bQqv
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ZacksJerryRig

snippet.description:
SerkanвҖҷДұn uГ§aДҹДұ Д°talyaвҖҷya iЕҹ iГ§in giderken kaybolur. Eda gelinliДҹi iГ§inde periЕҹan bir halde yere yДұДҹДұlДұr. DГјДҹГјn iГ§in toplanmДұЕҹ olan herkes ЕҹaЕҹkДұnlДұk ve korku iГ§indedir. UГ§aДҹДұn dГјЕҹtГјДҹГј kesinleЕҹir ama Serkan ortada yoktur.Kaza sonrasДұ Eda iГ§in SerkanвҖҷdan iyi haber bekleyerek geГ§en acДұ dolu gГјnler baЕҹlar. SerkanвҖҷДұn kaybДұ herkesin hayatДұnda derin yaralar aГ§mДұЕҹtДұr. Onun yokluДҹunda Eda, SerkanвҖҷДұn arkadaЕҹlarДұ ve Aydan da merak ve acДұ iГ§indedir. Birbirlerine destek olarak hem Г¶zel hayatlarДұnДұ sГјrdГјrmeye hem de Artlife MimarlДұkвҖҷtaki iЕҹleri aksatmadan sГјrdГјrmeye Г§alДұЕҹДұrlar.Sonunda Serkan geri dГ¶ner. Hem de yanДұnda tanДұdДұk biriyle. SaДҹlДұДҹДұ yerindedir ama geГ§en sГјre iГ§inde hayatДұnda Г§ok Еҹey deДҹiЕҹmiЕҹtir. Bu deДҹiЕҹimler EdaвҖҷyДұ derinden sarsar. Д°nsanlar ЕҹaЕҹkДұnlДұk iГ§indeyken Eda bu deДҹiЕҹim karЕҹДұsДұnda direnГ§ gГ¶stermeye kararlДұdДұr.

snippet.title: BMW M5 1000hp v ВЈ1.15M Rallycross Racers: RACE...and EXPLOSION!
snippet.description:
Need help buying your next car? Click https://www.carwow.co.uk/help-me-carwow and my team and I will help you choose your ideal car at a fair price - from Mat Watson!

Check out everything you need to know about these rallycross cars: https://www.rallycrossbrx.com/news/5nations-brx-put-to-the-test-by-carwow
.............................................................

Evolve's BMW M5 is BACK, and it's going up against three rallycross superstars! 

We've all seen what this incredible M5 can do, with its tuned 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8 able to produce 1000hp! As for the rallycars? Well, none of them can match the power of the M5, with the lead competitor being the MINI with a 2-litre turbocharged petrol engine that can put down 600hp & 1,000Nm! 

However, the M5 has one major disadvantage compared to the competition... It weighs in at 2 tonnes, while all three rallycross cars come in at just 1,300kg! 

So what do you think - is the M5 now the underdog?! Mat & Yianni have joined forces to see if they can take down these superstars, and all we know is, this race isn't to be missed!! 

.............................................................

snippet.title: Galaxy S21 Ultra Teardown! - Its bigger than you think....
snippet.description:
Its time to teardown the new Samsung Galaxy S21 Ultra 5G. The fingerprint scanner is HUGE!! Grab your Teardown skin HERE: https://www.dbrand.com/teardown The Galaxy S21 Ultra is the latest and greatest from Samsung. And today we are going to see how the S21 Ultra works from the inside. Its not the normal periscope camera, and invincible battery adhesive. But there is one thing we haven't seen yet... and thats the MASSIVE fingerprint scanner. One perk of using an Ultrasonic Fingerprint scanner vs an optical fingerprint scanner is that the surface area can more easily be expanded. 

Watch the Periscope teardown HERE: https://youtu.be/k-OZVWcyN5w?t=292
Get my razor knife here! https://www.jerryrigknife.com/ 
Watch the S21 Durability Test HERE: https://youtu.be/Y4wrxLVs3eU

*Follow me for updates!*
Instagram: http://instagram.com/zacksjerryrig
Facebook: http://on.fb.me/1U4bQqv
Twitter: https://twitter.com/ZacksJerryRig

LARGE tool kit: http://amzn.to/2DURcr7
Travel Tool Kit: https://amzn.to/30LKXOY
Green Pry tool: http://amzn.to/1Tu57pI
Metal phone opening tool: http://amzn.to/1WdOFv0
Replacement phone parts: https://www.fixez.com/?utm_source=JerryRigEverything&utm_medium=homepage&utm_campaign=JerryRigEverything

The camera I used to film this video: http://amzn.to/2p7GtkX
The Lens I used for this video: http://amzn.to/1QOXDw2
Wide angle lens: http://amzn.to/2qiYM4u
And this Metabones adapter: http://amzn.to/2iZ67Ty
This is the drone I use: https://click.dji.com/AI2tmSb0onM9XPVwb-Se0g

TO SEND ME STUFF: See my P.O. Box on my 'About page': https://www.youtube.com/user/JerryRigEverything/about

snippet.title: Who Keeps Ditching Supercars in the Desert?
snippet.description:
Thank you to Raycon for sponsoring todayвҖҷs video! To get premium audio in your life, go to https://buyraycon.com/donut for 15% off your order! Brought to you by Raycon.

Something strange is happening in Dubai. The desert oasis is home to some of the most extravagant architecture, people and CARS in the world. But someone is abandoning their cars in the desert, sometimes with the keys still in the ignition Who is responsible? Wealthy Sheikhs? Rich kids? Or is something else going on? WeвҖҷre gonna find out.

Something strange is happening in Dubai. The desert oasis is home to some of the most extravagant architecture, people and CARS in the world. But someone is abandoning their cars in the desert, sometimes with the keys still in the ignition Who is responsible? Wealthy Sheikhs? Rich kids? Or is something else going on? WeвҖҷre gonna find out.

Thanks to Rohan Robert for sharing some of his footage with us! Link to his channel:

snippet.title: Emanet 103. BГ¶lГјm | Legacy Episode 103
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KДұrДұmlДұ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвҖҷs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвҖҰ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвҖҷs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KДұrДұmlДұ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KДұrДұmlДұ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam

Lyrics:
DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

KSI:
All that time on your own with me
We had fun on the 360
I helped you get that UAV
Still could never get you that AC
Sneaking in school just to get by you
IвҖҷm obsessed with the scent on you
Coco Chanel on your neck with your body in check 
Loving all the time with you 
But now youвҖҷve just gone missing
And youвҖҷre airing all my wishes
YouвҖҷre online but you still wonвҖҷt listen
All my time is you dismissing 
This is in no way a 2 way street 
IвҖҷm playing sad and itвҖҷs on repeat
Got me here hoping you see my snap
Cos IвҖҷm not ready for us to wrap
Nowoooooo

DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

DonвҖҷt play games, donвҖҷt play games with my heart
Ohh eeeee
Now the feels hit me differently 
When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

Anne-Marie:
All the things you doing
yeah I think IвҖҷve seen it all before, seen it, seen it all before
ahhh
everything youвҖҷre saying
yeah I think IвҖҷve heard it all before yeah heard it all before
if you donвҖҷt give me your time
then I ainвҖҷt giving you mine
huh
if youвҖҷre gonna lie
then ima say goodbye 
every game youвҖҷre playing
yeah boy IвҖҷve played them all before
and I win them all 

KSI 
But now youвҖҷve just gone missing
And youвҖҷre airing all my wishes
YouвҖҷre online but you still wonвҖҷt listen
All my time is you dismissing 
This is in no way a 2 way street 
IвҖҷm playing sad And itвҖҷs on repeat
Got me here hoping you see my snap
Cos IвҖҷm not ready for us to wrap
Nowoooooo

Ohh eeeee

When theyвҖҷre hittin this deep donвҖҷt play, donвҖҷt play

snippet.title: BEST OF 2020 - Fabio Wibmer
snippet.description:
What a crazy year this has been!
2020 was one of the coolest but also toughest years for me. 
Israel is my Playground and Home Office were one of my favourtie videos ever and the feedback we got to those videos was mindblowing. The year started great but unfortunately ended with a big crash on my motocross bike. I'm currently recovering from my injury and I can't wait to do more videos in 2021. Thanks everyone for the love and support.
Let's make 2021 awesome!

в–ә Subscribe for more monthly videos/ Hier abonnieren: https://www.youtube.com/user/fabwibmer?sub_confirmation=1


в–ә Check out the SICK Shop & get some merch:
https://sick-series.com/

в–әWant to know what protection, bikes, parts and camera equipment I use? Here is a list of all things http://bit.ly/1QwCvpc


в–әYou can also follow me on:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/wibmerfabio (@wibmerfabio)
TikTok: @wibmerfabio
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/wibmerfabio


Cheers,
Fabio
